zh.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, Unit: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Swinnerton於1309年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，他的父親Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton23歲，母親Margaret Houghton25歲。他於1332年10月26日之後與Maud de Holand結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭史洛普爾被列為knight of the shire。他去世於1381年12月在法國享年72歲。

zh-hans.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, Unit: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Swinnerton于1309年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，他的父亲Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton23岁，母亲Margaret Houghton25岁。他于1332年10月26日之后与Maud de Holand结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰史洛普爾被列为knight of the shire。他去世于1381年12月在法国享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Swinnerton was born in 1309, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Houghton, was 25. He married Maud de Holand after 26 October 1332. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as knight of the shire in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in December 1381, in France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Swinnerton est né en 1309, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Houghton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Holand après 26 octobre 1332. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight of the shire à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en décembre 1381, à France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Swinnerton 1309 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Houghton 25. Er hat nach 26. Oktober 1332 Maud de Holand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als knight of the shire in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb im Dezember 1381 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Swinnerton è nato il nel 1309 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Houghton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Holand dopo il 26 ottobre 1332. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight of the shire nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel dicembre 1381, nel Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Swinnertonが1309年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnertonは23歳，母Margaret Houghtonは25歳であった。1332年10月26日以後にMaud de Holandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでの職業はknight of the shireと記録されている。彼は1381年12月にフランスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Swinnerton(이)가 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Houghton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1332년 10월 26일 이후 Maud de Holand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 knight of the shire이었다. 그는 1381년 12월 프랑스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, Unit: Swynnerton, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Swinnerton nasceu em 1309, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Houghton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Holand após 26 de outubro de 1332. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como knight of the shire em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1381, em França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Swinnerton родился в 1309 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Houghton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Holand после 26 октябрь 1332 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии knight of the shire в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер декабрь 1381 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

sm.1341-1343: mai le 1341 e o'o I le 1343

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Swinnerton nació en 1309, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Swynnerton 1st Lord Swynnerton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Houghton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Maud de Holand después de 26 de octubre de 1332. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era knight of the shire en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en diciembre de 1381, en Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
